description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to the build branch and on pull requests to the build branch. The workflow should have three jobs: build-macos, build-linux, and build-windows, each running on a different environment (macos-10.15, ubuntu-18.04, and windows-2019 respectively). Each job should check out the repository, set up the environment, install dependencies, and build and upload Python wheels as artifacts.
